summary: Sales & Funnel Dashboard and Designer Performance Dashboard testing completed successfully. Both backend APIs and frontend UIs are working correctly. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend pages load properly with all UI elements functional including funnel cards, conversion visualization, value change analysis, period selectors, and sidebar navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboards/sales - Returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/sales - funnel_summary contains inquiry/booked/signoff/cancelled with values and counts
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/sales - conversion_rates contains inquiry_to_booked and booked_to_signoff rates
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/sales - value_changes contains absolute_change and percent_change
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/sales?period=mtd - MTD period works correctly
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/sales?period=qtd - QTD period works correctly
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/sales?period=custom - Custom date range works correctly
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/designer - Returns 200 with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/designer - team_summary contains totals
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/designer - designers array contains per-designer metrics
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/designer - monthly_breakdown for time-based performance
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/designer?period=mtd - MTD period works correctly
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/designer?period=qtd - QTD period works correctly
Backend: GET /api/dashboards/designer?period=custom - Custom date range works correctly
Backend: Sales dashboard requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Designer dashboard requires authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: Sales Dashboard (/finance/sales-dashboard) loads correctly
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Page title 'Sales & Funnel Analysis' displays correctly
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Value source tooltip explains full value lifecycle
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Funnel cards show Inquiry/Booked/Sign-Off/Cancelled values with counts
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Conversion Funnel visualization displays correctly
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Value Change Analysis cards (Inquiry→Booked, Booked→Sign-Off) display correctly
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Period selector dropdown works (FY, QTD, MTD, Custom Range)
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Custom date inputs appear when Custom Range selected
Frontend: Sales Dashboard - Stage-wise Breakdown collapsible section works
Frontend: Designer Dashboard (/finance/designer-dashboard) loads correctly
Frontend: Designer Dashboard - Page title 'Designer Performance' displays correctly
Frontend: Designer Dashboard - Value source tooltip explains designer value attribution
Frontend: Designer Dashboard - Team Summary cards display correctly
Frontend: Designer Dashboard - Designer-wise Performance section shows unassigned projects
Frontend: Designer Dashboard - Period selector dropdown works (FY, QTD, MTD, Custom Range)
Frontend: Sidebar Finance menu - 'Sales & Funnel' link present and navigates correctly
Frontend: Sidebar Finance menu - 'Designer Performance' link present and navigates correctly
Frontend: Sidebar Finance menu - 'Finance Dashboard' link present
critical_code_review_comments: SalesDashboard.jsx: Well-structured with proper API integration, funnel visualization, and period filtering
DesignerDashboard.jsx: Consistent design with team summary, designer-wise breakdown, and expandable rows
Backend server.py: Dashboard APIs (lines 9045-9532) properly implement value lifecycle tracking with period filtering
Sidebar.jsx: Finance submenu correctly includes Sales & Funnel and Designer Performance links (lines 61-63)
App.js: Routes correctly defined for both dashboards (lines 164-165)
Note: All projects currently show as 'unassigned' (no primary_designer_id) which is expected for legacy data
seed_data_creation: Used existing test session from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales & Funnel Dashboard and Designer Performance Dashboard are fully functional. Backend APIs tested via pytest (16 tests passed). Frontend pages tested via Playwright. Both dashboards support period filtering (FY, MTD, QTD, Custom). The data shows all projects are currently 'unassigned' (no primary_designer_id) which is expected for legacy data. Sidebar navigation links are present and working.
